evidence: The paper uses minimum depth from randomForestExplainer, not impurity-based importance (Gini/MDI/variance). Section 2.4 states: "the minimum depth of each variable was calculated, which is frequently used as a measure of variable importance." Variable rankings are corroborated with Shannon entropy (round 3 drop for HCDR3, round 4 for LCDR3) and validated through independent phage ELISA, achieving 14 AR clones from the AR library versus 0 from the NR library. Main conclusions rest on held-out validation accuracy, not importance ranking.
